items.title: Bitcoin dips below $71K, but data shows BTC’s bullish momentum holding
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped below $71,000, but the market remains tilted toward bulls as spot ETF inflows and BTC buying from Strategy boost investor sentiment.
items.title_cn: 比特币跌破7.1万美元，但数据显示其看涨势头依然强劲
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格跌破7.1万美元，但由于现货ETF资金流入和战略购买提振了投资者情绪，市场仍偏向看涨。

items.title: Fed holds rates amid higher inflation outlook: Bitcoin bounces to $72K
items.summary: Bitcoin’s pre-FOMC sell-off eased as the US Federal Reserve's choice to leave interest rates unchanged was followed by a swift bounce in BTC price.
items.title_cn: 美联储维持利率不变，通胀预期上升：比特币反弹至7.2万美元
items.summary_cn: 随着美联储决定维持利率不变，比特币在联邦公开市场委员会会议前的抛售压力缓解，价格迅速反弹。

items.title: ‘Rich Dad, Poor Dad’ author says ‘pin is near’ on TradFi ‘bubble burst:’ Predicts $750K Bitcoin
items.summary: Author and personal finance educator Robert Kiyosaki says Bitcoin is going to $750,000, but there's a catch.
items.title_cn: 《富爸爸穷爸爸》作者称传统金融‘泡沫破裂’临近：预测比特币将达75万美元
items.summary_cn: 个人理财教育家罗伯特·清崎表示比特币将涨至75万美元，但存在一个前提条件。

items.title: Crypto traders eye ‘bullish relief rally’ after Fed holds rates steady
items.summary: Expectation of a relief rally persisted despite a widely used crypto sentiment indicator falling back into “Extreme Fear” on Wednesday.
items.title_cn: 美联储维持利率稳定后，加密货币交易员期待‘看涨缓解性反弹’
items.summary_cn: 尽管周三一项广泛使用的加密货币情绪指标回落至‘极度恐惧’区间，但市场对缓解性反弹的预期依然存在。

items.title: Fold Q4 revenue up, CEO sees Bitcoin rewards overtaking air miles
items.summary: Fold CEO Will Reeves said it is focused on scaling its 2026 product line after paying off two convertible debts, removing overhang and enabling it to focus on growth.
items.title_cn: Fold第四季度营收增长，CEO预计比特币奖励将超越航空里程
items.summary_cn: Fold首席执行官威尔·里夫斯表示，在偿还两笔可转换债务后，公司正专注于扩展其2026年产品线，消除了不确定性并专注于增长。

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
items.title_cn: 今日加密货币市场动态汇总
items.summary_cn: 需要了解今日加密货币市场动态吗？以下是关于影响比特币价格、区块链、DeFi、NFT、Web3和加密货币监管的每日趋势和事件的最新新闻。

items.title: Crypto Fear and Greed rebounds off extreme lows as traders re-enter
items.summary: The Crypto Fear and Greed Index just ended a 48-day stretch in the “extreme fear” zone, signalling improving sentiment among investors. Will fresh capital inflows reignite the bull market?
items.title_cn: 加密货币恐惧与贪婪指数从极端低点反弹，交易员重新入场
items.summary_cn: 加密货币恐惧与贪婪指数刚刚结束了连续48天的‘极度恐惧’区间，表明投资者情绪正在改善。新的资本流入会重新点燃牛市吗？

items.title: Ethereum aims to cut bridge times by 98% to 13 seconds with new rule
items.summary: Ethereum’s FCR aims to reduce bridge times by up to 98%, bringing L1-to-L2 and exchange deposits down to 13 seconds without a hard fork.
items.title_cn: 以太坊旨在通过新规则将跨链桥时间缩短98%至13秒
items.summary_cn: 以太坊的FCR旨在将跨链桥时间缩短高达98%，将L1到L2的转账和交易所存款时间降至13秒，无需硬分叉。

items.title: Why Ethereum developers want ‘one-click staking’ for institutions
items.summary: Ethereum developers are pushing one-click staking to simplify validator operations, attract institutions and strengthen decentralization across the network.
items.title_cn: 为什么以太坊开发者希望为机构提供‘一键质押’功能
items.summary_cn: 以太坊开发者正在推动一键质押功能，以简化验证者操作、吸引机构并加强整个网络的去中心化。

items.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
items.summary: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.
items.title_cn: Bitmine加速购买以太坊，将国库储备提升至460万ETH
items.summary_cn: 该公司约三分之二的代币目前处于质押状态，预计年化收入达1.8亿美元。

items.title: Coalition Urges OpenAI to Scrap AI Ballot Measure Over Child Safety Concerns
items.summary: Advocacy groups say the OpenAI-backed measure would limit legal accountability and lock in narrow protections for children.
items.title_cn: 联盟敦促OpenAI因儿童安全担忧放弃AI投票措施
items.summary_cn: 倡导团体表示，OpenAI支持的这项措施将限制法律问责，并固化对儿童的有限保护。

items.title: Algorand Foundation Cuts 25% of Staff as Crypto Industry Layoffs Grow
items.summary: The organization behind layer-1 blockchain Algorand laid off 25% of its staff due to macroeconomic uncertainty and lower crypto prices.
items.title_cn: Algorand基金会裁员25%，加密货币行业裁员潮加剧
items.summary_cn: 由于宏观经济不确定性和加密货币价格下跌，支持第一层区块链Algorand的组织裁减了25%的员工。

items.title: Report: Bill Seeks to Abolish South Korea’s 22% Digital Asset Tax
items.summary: South Korean lawmakers are once again tearing up the script on crypto taxation, this time with a proposal to scrap the levy altogether before it ever sees daylight. South Korea Crypto Policy Shift Could Remove Tax Burden Entirely According to the regional news publication Digital Asset, South Korea’s opposition party has introduced legislation to fully […]
items.title_cn: 报告：法案寻求废除韩国22%的数字资产税
items.summary_cn: 韩国立法者再次修改加密货币税收政策，这次提议在该税种生效前彻底取消。

items.title: Bank of Japan Holds Rates as Inflation Risks Mount
items.summary: The Bank of Japan held interest rates at 0.75%, citing global uncertainty and rising inflation risks linked to energy prices. Governor Kazuo Ueda signaled a cautious but flexible approach to future policy shifts. Governor Ueda Flags Inflation Risks, Keeps Rates Steady The Bank of Japan kept its benchmark interest rate unchanged at 0.75% on Thursday, […]
items.title_cn: 日本央行维持利率不变，通胀风险上升
items.summary_cn: 日本央行将利率维持在0.75%，理由是全球不确定性和与能源价格相关的通胀风险上升。行长植田和男表示对未来政策调整持谨慎但灵活的态度。

items.title: Boltz Launches Non-Custodial USDT Swaps Connecting Lightning to Stablecoins
items.summary: Boltz introduces a new service enabling instant, account-free swaps between the Lightning Network and USDT across multiple major networks. On March 18, 2026, the non-custodial exchange Boltz announced the launch of USDT Swaps, a tool bridging Bitcoin layers with the world’s most used stablecoin. This service allows users to swap between Satoshi units on the […]
items.title_cn: Boltz推出非托管USDT互换服务，连接闪电网络与稳定币
items.summary_cn: Boltz推出一项新服务，支持在闪电网络和多个主要网络上的USDT之间进行即时、无需账户的互换。

items.title: Breez SDK Integrates Passkey Login to Eliminate Traditional Seed Phrase Barriers
items.summary: Breez SDK now enables developers to offer biometric passkey logins, replacing manual seed phrase management for bitcoin self-custody. Breez CEO Roy Sheinfeld announced the integration of Passkey Login into the Breez Software Development Kit (SDK) on March 18, 2026. This update utilizes the WebAuthn Level 3 PRF extension to deterministically derive cryptographic keys directly from […]
items.title_cn: Breez SDK集成通行密钥登录，消除传统种子短语障碍
items.summary_cn: Breez SDK现在允许开发者提供生物识别通行密钥登录功能，取代比特币自托管中的手动种子短语管理。

items.title: Nasdaq Wins SEC Approval to Trade Tokenized Securities in Pilot Program
items.summary: The approval lets Nasdaq test tokenized versions of some stocks and ETFs without moving beyond existing market rails.

items.summary_cn: 该批准允许纳斯达克测试部分股票和ETF的代币化版本，同时不超出现有市场框架。

items.title: SBI VC Trade Launches Japan’s First Licensed USDC Lending Service
items.summary: SBI VC Trade has become the first licensed exchange in Japan to launch a USDC lending service, offering an introductory 10% annual yield. SBI VC Trade, a subsidiary of SBI Holdings, announced it will launch its “USDC Lending” service on March 19th, 2026, marking a first for licensed operators in Japan. The service allows customers […]
items.title_cn: SBI VC Trade推出日本首个持牌USDC借贷服务
items.summary_cn: SBI VC Trade成为日本首家推出USDC借贷服务的持牌交易所，提供10%的入门年化收益率。

items.title: OpenClaw Developers Lured in GitHub Phishing Campaign Targeting Crypto Wallets
items.summary: The phishing campaign lures OpenClaw developers with fake $5,000 token airdrops, then drains wallets through a cloned site with a hidden connection prompt.

items.title: Why Bitcoin Is Falling Despite $1.1 Billion in ETF Inflows
items.summary: Persistent inflation signals and surging oil prices are weighing on risk appetite, even as institutional money has continued to flow.

items.summary: Oil prices were always going to be a problem for the next Fed nominee. On Wednesday, Jerome Powell outlined another worry.

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment remains restrictive with Fed expectations stable at high rates (3.655%), DXY strong at 100.08 signaling risk-off flows, and US10Y yields elevated at 4.26%. VIX at 25.56 shows fear subsiding but still elevated. Japan's weak yen (159.14) adds intervention risk. Crypto-specific news is mixed with regulatory pressures (South Korea tax abolition bill, Algorand layoffs) but some positive developments (Ethereum bridge improvements). BTC Fear & Greed at 23 indicates extreme fear, potentially contrarian bullish.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: BTC shows oversold conditions with RSI at 34.1 and price rank at 11.4/100. Negative funding (-0.000045) and high long liquidations ($10.75M vs $3.05M short) suggest retail pain. Upper wick exhaustion at 52% indicates selling pressure at highs. No volume signals but ADX at 35 shows strong downtrend. Potential for short squeeze given oversold RSI and negative funding.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment neutral (-0.0) but token net flow strongly negative (-4.4M ETH), suggesting accumulation despite neutral sentiment. News mentions fear/greed rebound and bridge improvements. Technicals show ADX at 36 (strong trend), MACD negative (-23.26), and RSI at 42.5 (neutral). Long liquidations ($7.62M) exceed short ($3.28M). Lower wick exhaustion at 24.2% shows some buying pressure. 7-day trend (Prev_5_4H_Closes declining) vs 24H (Price_Unclosed 2174 vs Last_Closed 2165) shows slight divergence with potential stabilization.
* **Key Metric**: Negative token net flow (-4.4M ETH) indicates whale accumulation despite neutral sentiment score.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment slightly negative (-0.1) with positive token net flow (+3.2M SOL), suggesting distribution. News identical to crypto general (regulatory pressures). Technicals show ADX at 30.3 (moderate trend), MACD negative (-0.70), RSI at 44.6. Long liquidations ($4.06M) significantly exceed short ($1.01M). Upper wick exhaustion at 38.5% shows selling pressure. 7-day trend (Prev_5_4H_Closes declining) aligns with 24H price action (89.92 vs 89.36).
* **Key Metric**: Positive token net flow (+3.2M SOL) indicates whale distribution despite only slightly negative sentiment.

**BNB Context**: Price rank 11.9/100, RSI 36.7 (oversold), negative funding (-0.000013), high long liquidations ($221K). L/S ratios below 1 (0.92/0.93). Signal: OBSERVE for potential bounce.

**DOGE Context**: Extreme price rank 9.3/100, RSI 38.6, massive upper wick exhaustion (80.2%), high long liquidations ($3.64M). L/S account ratio 1.35 but position ratio 0.84. Signal: PROBE for oversold bounce.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境仍然紧缩，美联储预期稳定在较高利率（3.655%），美元指数强势（100.08）显示避险资金流动，美国10年期国债收益率处于高位（4.26%）。VIX指数25.56显示恐惧情绪有所缓解但仍处高位。日元疲软（159.14）增加干预风险。加密货币特定新闻喜忧参半，监管压力（韩国废除数字资产税法案、Algorand裁员）与积极发展（以太坊桥接改进）并存。BTC恐惧贪婪指数23显示极度恐惧，可能存在逆向看涨机会。

**🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探
* **现实检查**: BTC显示超卖条件，RSI为34.1，价格排名11.4/100。负资金费率（-0.000045）和高多头清算（1075万美元 vs 305万美元空头）表明散户痛苦。上影线耗尽率52%显示高位卖压。无成交量信号但ADX为35显示强劲下跌趋势。考虑到超卖RSI和负资金费率，存在空头挤压潜力。

**🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检查**: 鲸鱼情绪中性（-0.0）但代币净流出强烈（-440万ETH），表明尽管情绪中性但存在积累。新闻提及恐惧贪婪指数反弹和桥接改进。技术指标显示ADX为36（强趋势），MACD负值（-23.26），RSI为42.5（中性）。多头清算（762万美元）超过空头（328万美元）。下影线耗尽率24.2%显示一定买压。7日趋势（前5个4小时收盘价下降）与24小时（未收盘价2174 vs 最后收盘2165）显示轻微背离，可能出现稳定。
* **关键指标**: 负代币净流出（-440万ETH）表明鲸鱼积累，尽管情绪分数中性。

**🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检查**: 鲸鱼情绪略负（-0.1）且代币净流入为正（+320万SOL），表明分配行为。新闻与加密货币总体相同（监管压力）。技术指标显示ADX为30.3（中等趋势），MACD负值（-0.70），RSI为44.6。多头清算（406万美元）显著超过空头（101万美元）。上影线耗尽率38.5%显示卖压。7日趋势（前5个4小时收盘价下降）与24小时价格行为（89.92 vs 89.36）一致。
* **关键指标**: 正代币净流入（+320万SOL）表明鲸鱼分配，尽管情绪仅略负。

**BNB背景**: 价格排名11.9/100，RSI 36.7（超卖），负资金费率（-0.000013），高多头清算（22.1万美元）。多空比率低于1（0.92/0.93）。信号：观察潜在反弹。

**DOGE背景**: 极端价格排名9.3/100，RSI 38.6，巨大上影线耗尽率（80.2%），高多头清算（364万美元）。多空账户比率1.35但仓位比率0.84。信号：试探超卖反弹。
